description: Tone validation patterns for PAO external communications

reject_patterns.pattern: (?:[Ww]e appreciate your patience|[Pp]lease be advised|[Pp]er our discussion|[Aa]s per|[Kk]indly note|[Pp]lease do not hesitate)
reject_patterns.message: Corporate speak detected. Use conversational tone instead.

reject_patterns.pattern: (?:[Ii]t has been determined|[Ii]t was decided|[Hh]as been escalated|[Ii]s being investigated|[Hh]as been noted)
reject_patterns.message: Formal passive voice detected. Use active voice: 'We determined...' or 'We're looking into...'
Marketing hype detected. Be specific about what the feature does, not how great it is.

reject_patterns.pattern: ^\s*(?:[Tt]hanks for your feedback\.?|[Tt]hank you for reaching out\.?)\s*$
reject_patterns.message: Empty acknowledgment without substance. Add specific context or next steps.
Robot signature detected. Responses should end naturally, not with formal sign-offs.

reject_patterns.pattern: (?:[Ww]e will ship|[Ww]e'll release|[Cc]oming soon|[Ii]n the next release|[Dd]efinitely fix|[Gg]uaranteed)
reject_patterns.message: Over-promising detected. Only commit to what the team has explicitly agreed to.

reject_patterns.pattern: (?:[Ww]orks as designed|[Nn]ot a bug|[Ww]on't fix|[Tt]hat's expected|[Uu]ser error)
reject_patterns.message: Dismissive language detected. Acknowledge the experience before explaining the design.
Profanity detected. Never include profanity, even when quoting.

require_patterns.message: Response should include acknowledgment of the author's contribution.

require_patterns.pattern: (?:[Ll]et us know|[Ff]eel free|[Hh]appy to help|[Ww]e'll update|[Rr]each out|[Ww]e'll dig|[Kk]eep us posted)
require_patterns.message: Response should end with an action-oriented close.

require_patterns.pattern: (?:[Cc]urrently|[Rr]ight now|[Aa]t the moment|[Aa]s of|[Tt]he way it works)
require_patterns.message: Feature guidance should provide context on current state.
Technical uncertainty should be honest about unknowns.

high.description: Answered before, clear docs, community consensus

medium.description: Technically sound but minor uncertainty or tone-dependent

low.description: Technical uncertainty, policy decision, reputational risk
